# nat-progress

## Overview

Modern Progress Bar

## Properties

| Property        | Attribute       | Description                                          | Type                   | Default |
| --------------- | --------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------- | ------- |
| `indeterminate` | `indeterminate` | Indeterminate state (loading without specific value) | `boolean`              | `false` |
| `showValue`     | `show-value`    | Whether to display the percentage text               | `boolean`              | `false` |
| `size`          | `size`          | Size of the progress bar                             | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm"` | `'md'`  |
| `value`         | `value`         | The progress value (0 to 100)                        | `number`               | `0`     |
